examples: Having an efficient means of transportation, that helps the Iroquois to form a federation linked by natural waterways.
Iroquois county is surrounded by Kankakee, Ford, Vermilion counties.
The coureurs des bois faced deadly rapids, canyons, blizzards, bears, wolves, and marauding Iroquois.
Keen to secure control over the fur trade and expand their territory, the Mohawks, an Iroquois tribe, attacked huron lands.
